titles.title: May My Life Be a Stepping Stone

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The other day I bowed my head and cried in shame; I asked the Lord if there’s someone that I could show the way When I think of all the loved ones who live their lives in vain, I pray Dear Lord may I not be the one that is to blame.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: May my life down here be a stepping stone for them, May they not see me but Christ living in me Help me spend more time on my knees in prayer for them, Before you close the door like you did in Noah’s time.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It’s getting late soon time will be no more Help me walk in the light of the prophet of Malachi 4 Not to rely on others but do what the Word says to do Till you call for me, let me live my life for you.
